get.description: The active time-scale (speed) of this controller's simulated clock, plus the current tick counter (controller HAL §7, architecture §3). A diagnostic/test surface, not a production control path — the platform relays it only as an explicit simulation-only exception, and a real-hardware backend returns 404. Each controller has its own independent clock; this reports only this greenhouse's.

put.summary: Set the simulated-clock time-scale (simulated HAL only)
put.description: Sets the wall-clock tick cadence multiplier (sleep = tick_period_ms / scale), latched to the next tick. Speeding up costs CPU but does not change the per-tick simulation step Δt, so determinism/replay is preserved (controller HAL §7). Reset to real-time with `scale: 1.0`. A value outside the accepted range is rejected with 422. Simulated backend only — a real-hardware backend returns 404. The time-scale is ephemeral and resets to the configured default (1.0) on restart.

200.description: The time-scale state after applying the request.
